title: Cuneiform Tablet #0584: Old Akkadian Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
